reason: Carries repositoryId in the open event and passes initialRepositoryId into the wizard modal.
Adds project/repository target picker, repository target initialization, and target-kind reset semantics.
Pure target projection for project and repository modes; keeps synthesized repository target testable.
Unit coverage for repository synthetic ProjectRef/context and project target repository projection.
Single-repository mode copy and disables manual extra cluster creation.
Single-repository dispatch copy and visible global dispatch errors for backend Trellis root rejection.
Single-repository review/write copy so the flow no longer reads as multi-cluster only.
Existing planClusters single-repository branch proves R5 is supported by the planning core.
Existing TaskSplitContext already supports repository mode and required repository fields.
